159 
SR_NVGTN_OPT_IN_OUT_IND 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Opted In or Out of Navigation services 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR)Beneficiary opted in or out of navigation services. 
LONG NAME: SR_NVGTN_OPT_IN_OUT_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
0 = Opted out 
1 = Opted in 
Missing - Not eligible 
COMMENT: 
Variables that start with “SR” include information
